tools.name: get_spreadsheet
tools.description: Retrieve spreadsheet metadata including all sheet names, IDs, and properties. Set includeGridData=false (the default) to get only metadata without cell values -- use get_values or batch_get_values for reading cell data. Use the 'fields' parameter to limit the response (e.g. fields='sheets.properties' to get only sheet names and IDs). The spreadsheetId appears in the URL: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/{spreadsheetId}/.

tools.name: get_spreadsheet_by_data_filter
tools.description: Retrieve spreadsheet metadata and cell data using DataFilters instead of A1 ranges. Supports GridRange filters, developer metadata filters, and A1Range filters. Use get_spreadsheet and get_values for simpler cases.

tools.name: get_values
tools.description: Read cell values from a single A1 notation range (e.g. 'Sheet1!A1:D10', 'Sheet1!A:A', 'Sheet1!1:5'). Returns a 2D array of values. Use get_spreadsheet first to discover sheet names. Specify 'Sheet1!A1:Z1000' for a wide range or just 'Sheet1' to read the entire sheet. Use batch_get_values for multiple ranges in one call.

tools.name: batch_get_values
tools.description: Read cell values from multiple A1 notation ranges in a single API call. More efficient than calling get_values multiple times. Returns an array of valueRanges, each with range and values. Use when reading from multiple sheets or discontiguous ranges.

tools.name: get_values_by_data_filter
tools.description: Retrieve cell values using DataFilters instead of A1 notation. Useful for filtering by developer metadata or GridRange objects. For standard range reads, use get_values or batch_get_values.

tools.name: search_developer_metadata
tools.description: Search for developer metadata entries in a spreadsheet using metadata key, value, visibility, or location filters. Developer metadata is custom key-value data attached to spreadsheet elements.

tools.name: get_developer_metadata
tools.description: Get a specific developer metadata entry by its integer metadata ID. Use search_developer_metadata to find metadata IDs.

tools.name: create_spreadsheet
tools.description: Create a new Google Spreadsheet. Accepts a full spreadsheet resource body, allowing you to specify the title, initial sheets, and cell data. Minimum: provide {title: 'My Spreadsheet'}. Returns the created spreadsheet including its spreadsheetId.

tools.name: update_values
tools.description: Write values to a specific A1 range, replacing existing content. Use valueInputOption='USER_ENTERED' to parse values as the user would type them (supports formulas, dates, currency). Use 'RAW' to store values as literal strings. Provide values as a 2D array (rows of columns).

tools.name: append_values
tools.description: Append rows of values after the last row of existing data in a range. Useful for adding new rows to a table without knowing the exact next row number. Uses USER_ENTERED valueInputOption by default. The range determines which sheet to append to.

tools.name: batch_update_values
tools.description: Write values to multiple A1 ranges in a single API call. More efficient than calling update_values multiple times. Provide a data array where each item has range and values. Use valueInputOption='USER_ENTERED' for formulas and dates.

tools.name: batch_update_values_by_data_filter
tools.description: Write values to ranges identified by DataFilters instead of A1 notation. Supports GridRange and developer metadata filters. For standard range writes, use update_values or batch_update_values.

tools.name: clear_values
tools.description: Clear all values (but not formatting) in the specified A1 range. The cells remain but their content is removed. To clear formatting as well, use batch_update with a repeatCell request.

tools.name: batch_clear_values
tools.description: Clear values from multiple A1 ranges in a single API call. More efficient than calling clear_values multiple times.

tools.name: batch_clear_values_by_data_filter
tools.description: Clear values from ranges identified by DataFilters. For standard range clears, use clear_values or batch_clear_values.

tools.name: batch_update
tools.description: Send a spreadsheets.batchUpdate request for structural changes such as addSheet, deleteSheet, duplicateSheet, insertDimension, deleteDimension, mergeCells, sortRange, addConditionalFormatRule, and more. Accepts a requests array. Use update_values or batch_update_values for writing cell data.

tools.name: copy_to_spreadsheet
tools.description: Copy a specific sheet (tab) from one spreadsheet to another. Provide the source spreadsheetId, the sheetId (integer, from get_spreadsheet), and the destination spreadsheetId. Returns the copied sheet's properties in the destination spreadsheet.
